podman run --name claude-pod-TIMESTAMP --rm -w /home/kai/tmp/claude-pod-python --userns=keep-id --security-opt label=disable -v /home/kai/.bash_history:/home/kai/.bash_history:ro -v /home/kai/.bash_logout:/home/kai/.bash_logout:ro -v /home/kai/.bash_profile:/home/kai/.bash_profile:ro -v /home/kai/.bashrc:/home/kai/.bashrc:ro -v /home/kai/.betty:/home/kai/.betty:ro -v /home/kai/.bun:/home/kai/.bun:ro -v /home/kai/.cache:/home/kai/.cache:ro -v /home/kai/.claude:/home/kai/.claude -v /home/kai/.claude.json:/mnt/.claude.json:ro -v /home/kai/.config:/home/kai/.config -v /home/kai/.cursor:/home/kai/.cursor:ro -v /home/kai/.gitconfig:/home/kai/.gitconfig:ro -v /home/kai/.local:/home/kai/.local -v /home/kai/.npm:/home/kai/.npm:ro -v /home/kai/.pki:/home/kai/.pki:ro -v /home/kai/.ssh:/home/kai/.ssh:ro -v /home/kai/.tmux:/home/kai/.tmux:ro -v /home/kai/.tmux.conf:/home/kai/.tmux.conf:ro -v /home/kai/.zcompdump:/home/kai/.zcompdump:ro -v /home/kai/.zprofile:/home/kai/.zprofile:ro -v /home/kai/.zshrc:/home/kai/.zshrc:ro -v /home/kai/bin:/home/kai/bin:ro -v /home/kai/google-cloud-sdk:/home/kai/google-cloud-sdk:ro -v /home/kai/notes:/home/kai/notes:ro -v /home/kai/obsidian:/home/kai/obsidian:ro -v /home/kai/src:/home/kai/src:ro -v /home/kai/tmp:/home/kai/tmp -v /home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew:/home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew:ro -e CLAUDE_POD_NO_YOLO=1 -i claude-pod:latest
